mapper.insert: Insert into productFile(productNo, productOriginFileName,productStoredFileName,productFileSize,productWriter) values ( (SELECT IFNULL((SELECT max(productNo)+1),1) From product) ,#{productOriginFileName},#{productStoredFileName},#{productFileSize},#{productWriter})
mapper.select: SELECT rnum,productNo,title,type,price,content,location,writer,hitCnt,likeCnt,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn,productStoredFileName FROM ( SELECT p.productNo,p.title,p.type,p.price,p.content,p.location,p.writer,p.hitCnt,p.likeCnt,p.regDate,p.modDate,p.delDate,p.deleteYn, f.productStoredFileName ,ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY productNo DESC ) AS rnum FROM product p LEFT OUTER JOIN productFile f ON p.productNo = f.productNo WHERE 1=1 ) R WHERE 1=1 AND deleteYn ='N' GROUP BY productNo ORDER BY productNo DESC LIMIT #{startRow},12

SELECT p.productNo,p.title,p.type,p.price,p.content,p.location,p.writer,p.hitCnt,p.likeCnt,p.regDate,p.modDate,p.delDate,p.deleteYn, f.productStoredFileName FROM product p LEFT OUTER JOIN productFile f ON p.productNo = f.productNo WHERE 1=1 AND p.productNo =#{productNo} AND p.deleteYn ='N'

SELECT a.busiNo,a.busiNum,a.writer,a.ownerName,a.busiTel,a.busiName,a.busiType1,a.busiType2,a.busiType3,a.storeTel ,a.storeAddr,a.storeAddrDetail,a.agreeYn,a.state,a.homepage,a.introduce,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn,a.title ,b.storedFileName FROM busi a INNER JOIN storeFile b ON a.busiNo = b.busiNo WHERE 1=1 AND a.deleteYn='N' AND b.fileNo = a.busiNo

SELECT busiNo,busiNum,writer,ownerName,busiTel,busiName,busiType1,busiType2,busiType3,storeTel,storeAddr,storeAddrDetail,introduce,homePage,agreeYn,state ,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn,title FROM busi WHERE 1=1 AND busiNo= #{busiNo}
SELECT fileNo,busiNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM storeFile WHERE 1=1 AND busiNo = #{busiNo}

SELECT a.menuNo,a.busiNo,a.name,a.price,a.count,a.content,a.deleveryYn,a.deleveryPrice,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn ,b.fileNo,b.menuNo,b.originFileName,b.storedFileName,b.fileSize,b.fileSize,b.writer,b.regDate,b.modDate,b.delDate,b.deleteYn FROM menu a INNER JOIN menufile b ON a.menuNo = b.menuNo WHERE busiNo = #{busiNo} and a.deleteYn='N'
mapper.insert: Insert Into estateFile (esNo ,originFileName ,storedFileName ,fileSize ,writer ) Values ( (SELECT IFNULL(max(esNo)+1,1) FROM estate ) ,#{originFileName},#{storedFileName},#{fileSize},#{writer})
mapper.select: SELECT esNo,esHumType,esRoomType,esLoc,esLocDetail,esLocContent,esTradeType,esPrice,esPosiType,esTradeYn ,esSize1,esSize2,esOption1,esOption2,esOption3,esCostYn,esCost,esCostChk,esSeperCostChk,esCostContent ,esLoanYn,esAnimalYn,esParkingYn,esMoveYn,esMoveDate,esFacility,esAdvantage,esHouseIntro,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM estate WHERE 1=1 AND deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,esNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM estatefile WHERE 1=1 AND deleteYn='N'

SELECT esNo,esHumType,esRoomType,esLoc,esLocDetail,esLocContent,esTradeType,esPrice,esPosiType,esTradeYn ,esSize1,esSize2,esOption1,esOption2,esOption3,esCostYn,esCost,esCostChk,esSeperCostChk,esCostContent ,esLoanYn,esAnimalYn,esParkingYn,esMoveYn,esMoveDate,esFacility,esAdvantage,esHouseIntro,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM estate WHERE 1=1 AND deleteYn='N' AND esNo=#{esNo}
SELECT fileNo,esNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM estatefile WHERE 1=1 AND deleteYn='N' AND esNo=#{esNo}
mapper.insert: Insert Into carFile (writer,carNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize) values (#{writer},( SELECT IFNULL(max(carNo)+1,1) FROM car ) , #{originFileName},#{storedFileName},#{fileSize})
mapper.select:
SELECT carNo,carWriter,carPrice,carTradeYn,carUserId,carType,carManuFacturing,carModel ,carRank,carDetailRank,carDiffDate,carRegDate,carDistance,carDisplaceMent ,carFuel,carTransMission,carAccidentCnt,carSpecialUseYn,carChangeCnt ,carOption1,carOPtion2,carOption3,carAdditionInfo,carIntro,carLoc ,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn
FROM car WHERE deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,carNo,writer,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM carFile WHERE deleteYn='N'

SELECT carNo,carWriter,carPrice,carTradeYn,carUserId,carType,carManuFacturing,carModel ,carRank,carDetailRank,carDiffDate,carRegDate,carDistance,carDisplaceMent ,carFuel,carTransMission,carAccidentCnt,carSpecialUseYn,carChangeCnt ,carOption1,carOPtion2,carOption3,carAdditionInfo,carIntro,carLoc ,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn
FROM car WHERE deleteYn='N' And carNo=#{carNo}
SELECT jobNo,jobWriter,jobCompany,jobTitle,jobType,jobMoney,jobLoc,jobLocDetail,jobWorkTime,jobLocContent,jobContent, regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM job WHERE deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,jobNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM jobFile WHERE deleteYN='N'

SELECT jobNo,jobWriter,jobCompany,jobTitle,jobType,jobMoney,jobLoc,jobLocDetail,jobWorkDate,jobWorkTime,jobLocContent,jobContent, regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn, TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE,regDate,NOW()) regMinute,TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR,regDate,NOW()) regHour ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY ,regDate,NOW()) regDay , TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK ,regDate,NOW())regWeek , TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH ,regDate,NOW())regMonth , TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR ,regDate,NOW()) regYear FROM job WHERE deleteYn='N' And jobNo=#{jobNo}
SELECT busiNoticeNo,busiNo,title,subTitle,content,subContent,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busiNotice WHERE writer=#{writer} AND deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,busiNoticeNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busiNoticeFile WHERE writer=#{writer} AND deleteYn='N'
SELECT busiNoticeNo,busiNo,title,subTitle,content,subContent,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busiNotice WHERE busiNoticeNo=#{busiNoticeNo} AND deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,busiNoticeNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busiNoticeFile WHERE busiNoticeNo=#{busiNoticeNo} AND deleteYn='N'
mapper.insert: Insert into busiReviewFile (busiReviewNo, originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer) values( (SELECT IFNULL(max(busiReviewNo),1) FROM busiReview ) , #{originFileName},#{storedFileName},#{fileSize},#{writer})
mapper.select: SELECT a.busiReviewNo,a.busiNo,a.title,a.content,a.writer,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn ,b.storedFileName ,c.busiName ,d.userAddr1 From busireview a INNER JOIN busireviewfile b ON a.busiReviewNo = b.busiReviewNo INNER JOIN busi c ON a.busiNo =c.busiNo INNER JOIN user d ON a.writer = d.userId GROUP BY busiReviewNo ORDER BY hitCnt DESC

SELECT a.busiReviewNo,a.busiNo,a.title,a.content,a.writer,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn,max(a.hitCnt) as hitCnt ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.regDate,NOW()) regMinute,TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, a.regDate,NOW()) regHour,TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY , a.regDate,NOW()) regDay ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK , a.regDate,NOW()) regWeek,TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH , a.regDate,NOW()) regMonth,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, a.regDate,NOW()) regYear ,b.storedFileName ,c.busiName ,d.userAddr1 From busireview a INNER JOIN busireviewfile b ON a.busiReviewNo = b.busiReviewNo INNER JOIN busi c ON a.busiNo =c.busiNo INNER JOIN user d ON a.writer = d.userId WHERE a.busiNo = #{busiNo} GROUP BY busiReviewNo

SELECT a.busiReviewNo,a.busiNo,a.title,a.content,a.writer,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn, hitCnt ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(MINUTE, a.regDate,NOW()) regMinute,TIMESTAMPDIFF(HOUR, a.regDate,NOW()) regHour,TIMESTAMPDIFF(DAY , a.regDate,NOW()) regDay ,TIMESTAMPDIFF(WEEK , a.regDate,NOW()) regWeek,TIMESTAMPDIFF(MONTH , a.regDate,NOW()) regMonth,TIMESTAMPDIFF(YEAR, a.regDate,NOW()) regYear ,b.busiName ,c.userAddr1 From busireview a INNER JOIN busi b ON a.busiNo =b.busiNo INNER JOIN user c ON a.writer = c.userId WHERE a.busiNo = #{busiNo} AND a.deleteYn='N'
SELECT fileNo,busiReviewNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer,regDate,modDate,delDate,deleteYn FROM busiReviewFile WHERE busiReviewNo = #{busiReviewNo} AND deleteYn='N'
mapper.insert: Insert Into userJobFile ( userJobNo,originFileName,storedFileName,fileSize,writer ) values ( (select IFNULL(max(userJobNo),1) from userJob ) , #{originFileName}, #{storedFileName}, #{fileSize}, #{writer} )
mapper.select: SELECT a.userJobNo,a.writer,a.lastName,a.firstName,a.tel,a.gender,a.birthYear,a.careerYn,a.careerLoc,a.careerWork,a.careerYear,a.careerDiff ,a.advantage,a.introduce,a.addInfo,a.regDate,a.modDate,a.delDate,a.deleteYn ,b.storedFIleName FROM userjob a INNER JOIN userjobfile b ON a.userJobNo =b.userJobNo WHERE a.writer = #{writer} AND a.deleteYn ='N' AND b.deleteYn ='N'
mapper.update: UPDATE userJobFile set delDate = now(), deleteYn='Y' WHERE fileNo != (SELECT MAX(fileNo) AS fileNo FROM userjobfile)
UPDATE userJob set delDate = now() ,deleteYn='Y' WHERE writer=#{writer}
UPDATE userJobFile set delDate = now() ,deleteYn='Y' WHERE writer=#{writer}
